title: gentiana affinis var. bigelovii
intro: Gentiana affinis var. bigelovii is a variety of the Gentiana affinis plant, a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gentiana affinis var. bigelovii are said to include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Gentiana affinis var. bigelovii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
